shared.noConversation: No active agent conversation ID in context.
shared.dynamicToolActivationDisabled: Dynamic tool activation is disabled in settings. An administrator can enable it in Settings → Agent Defaults.
shared.invalidToolsArray: 'tools' must be a non-empty array of tool names or domain prefixes.
shared.searchActionNudgeDisabled: IMPORTANT: Some discovered tools are NOT currently enabled (isEnabled: false). You MUST call enable_tools with the tool names you need before you can use them. After enabling, the tools become available on your next iteration.

enable_tools.noValidTools: None of the requested entries resolved to valid tool names. Check spelling or use search_tools to discover available tools.
enable_tools.alreadyEnabled: All requested tools are already enabled and available — you can call them directly right now.
enable_tools.activated: Activated {{count}} tool(s). They will be available on the next iteration.

disable_tools.noneInSet: None of the requested tools were in the active set.
disable_tools.protectedSuffix: {{count}} core tool(s) were protected and cannot be disabled.

discover_and_enable_tools.noQueryOrDomain: At least one of 'query' or 'domain' is required.
discover_and_enable_tools.foundAndEnabled: Found {{matchCount}} tool(s) and auto-enabled {{enabledCount}}. They are available on the next iteration — call them directly.
discover_and_enable_tools.foundAlreadyEnabled: Found {{matchCount}} tool(s), all were already enabled — call them directly.

set_timer.noConversation: No active agent session / conversation ID in context.
set_timer.invalidDuration: 'durationSeconds' must be between {{min}} and {{max}} seconds. For longer scheduled reminders or recurring events, use create_cron_job instead.

list_timers.noConversation: No active agent session / conversation ID in context.

cancel_timer.notFound: No active timer found with ID {{timerId}}.

enter_worktree.noConversation: No agent conversation — worktree isolation requires an active conversation
enter_worktree.alreadyInWorktree: Already in a worktree (branch: {{branch}}). Call exit_worktree first.
enter_worktree.success: Now working in isolated worktree. All file operations are redirected to {{path}}. Call exit_worktree with action 'merge' or 'discard' when done.

exit_worktree.notInWorktree: Not currently in a worktree. Call enter_worktree first.
exit_worktree.mergeFailed: Merge failed: {{error}}. Worktree preserved at {{path}}. Resolve conflicts and try again, or exit_worktree with action 'discard'.
exit_worktree.merged: Changes from {{branch}} merged into main branch. Workspace restored.
exit_worktree.discarded: Worktree {{branch}} discarded. All changes removed. Workspace restored.

search_conversations.noEmbeddings: No conversations with embeddings found. Conversations are automatically embedded after agent sessions with 6+ messages.

summarize_conversation.summaryRequired: 'summary' is required and must be a non-empty string

ask_user.questionsRequired: The 'questions' array is required and must not be empty
ask_user.invalidQuestion: Each question in the 'questions' array must have a non-empty 'question' string
ask_user.noConversation: No conversation — ask_user_question requires an active conversation
ask_user.timedOut: The user did not respond within 5 minutes.

authenticate_mcp_server.noCredentials: At least one of 'token', 'api_key', or 'env' must be provided

write_todo.invalidItems: 'items' must be an array of todo objects
